sections.headline: FUTURE READY
sections.subheadline: Building the digital infrastructure of tomorrow, today. Next-generation interfaces for the connected world.

sections.heading: SYSTEM STATUS
sections.body:
I specialize in creating immersive digital experiences that push the boundaries of what's possible on the web. From WebGL visualizations to real-time collaborative interfaces, I build systems that feel like they're from the future.

My toolkit includes React, Three.js, WebSockets, and a deep understanding of performance optimization. I believe the web is the most powerful platform for creative expression and utility.

Currently exploring: AI-powered interfaces, spatial computing, and the intersection of art and technology.

items.title: NEURAL INTERFACE
items.description: Real-time AI collaboration platform with 100K+ active users. Features include live code editing, AI-powered suggestions, and instant deployment.

items.title: QUANTUM DASHBOARD
items.description: 3D data visualization platform for financial analytics. Built with Three.js and WebGL for GPU-accelerated rendering.

items.title: SYNTHWAVE AUDIO
items.description: Browser-based synthesizer and audio workstation. Real-time audio processing with Web Audio API.

items.title: HOLODECK PRESENCE
items.description: AR/VR collaboration platform for remote teams. Spatial audio, hand tracking, and shared 3D environments.

sections.heading: ESTABLISH CONNECTION
sections.subheading: Ready to build something extraordinary together?
